segments.text: sonarland's quick fix feature allows you
to modernize your approach to address
code quality issues in your ide
by helping you fix issues and
intelligently providing real-time
suggestions that are adapted to your
specific code sonalin can save you time
and effort in delivering clean code
here's an instance of a bug that can
throw a runtime exception
the quick fix helps address this to a
compliant solution via a simple
keystroke or key map
here's another example of a language
spec violation where the modifier should
be declared correctly
by changing static public to public
static aligns the code to the standard
order and improves code readability
a couple of quick keystrokes brings up
the rule violation and suggests the
quick fix for you
we hope you enjoy using this new quick
fix feature in sonarlin to address your
code quality issues and expedite your
code delivery
sonarlint is free and open source and
available in visual studio vs code
eclipse and your jetbrains ide
give it a try by visiting sonarlin.org
or via your ide marketplace

fullText: sonarland's quick fix feature allows you to modernize your approach to address code quality issues in your ide by helping you fix issues and intelligently providing real-time suggestions that are adapted to your specific code sonalin can save you time and effort in delivering clean code here's an instance of a bug that can throw a runtime exception the quick fix helps address this to a compliant solution via a simple keystroke or key map here's another example of a language spec violation where the modifier should be declared correctly by changing static public to public static aligns the code to the standard order and improves code readability a couple of quick keystrokes brings up the rule violation and suggests the quick fix for you we hope you enjoy using this new quick fix feature in sonarlin to address your code quality issues and expedite your code delivery sonarlint is free and open source and available in visual studio vs code eclipse and your jetbrains ide give it a try by visiting sonarlin.org or via your ide marketplace
